info.title: Commune API
info.description:
The Commune API lets AI agents and developers send and receive email, manage inboxes and domains, and process structured data from email conversations. All endpoints require a Bearer API key.

Base URL: `https://api.commune.email`

Authentication: Pass your API key as `Authorization: Bearer comm_...`

bearerAuth.description: API key issued from the Commune dashboard. Prefix `comm_`.

extracted_data.description: Structured data extracted via inbox extraction schema (if configured)

snippet.description: Preview of the latest message content

events.description: Event types to subscribe to (default: all)

secret.description: HMAC signing secret (write-only, not returned in reads)

schema.description: JSON Schema (type: object) describing the fields to extract

localPart.description: Local part of the inbox email address (e.g. `support` in `support@yourdomain.com`)

domain_id.description: ID of the domain this inbox belongs to

records.description: DNS records to configure for this domain

html.description: HTML body. At least one of html or text is required.

text.description: Plain text body. At least one of html or text is required.

domain_id.description: Domain to send from (inferred from inbox_id if provided)

post.description:
Send an outbound email message. Supports threading, CC/BCC, HTML/text bodies, and file attachments. Emails are queued via BullMQ and delivered through your domain's SMTP configuration.

Requires `messages:write` permission.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Unique key for idempotent request deduplication. If a request with the same key was already processed within 24 hours, the cached response is returned with header Idempotency-Replayed: true.

202.description: Email accepted and queued for delivery

get.description:
List messages filtered by inbox, domain, or sender. At least one filter is required.

Requires `messages:read` permission.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Return messages before this ISO date

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Return messages after this ISO date

get.description:
List email threads with cursor-based pagination. Either `inbox_id` or `domain_id` is required.

Requires `threads:read` permission.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response's `next_cursor`

get.description:
Returns all messages in a thread in chronological order.

Requires `threads:read` permission.

Returns tags, status, and assignment for a thread.

Requires `threads:read` permission.

put.description:
Set the triage status of a thread.

Requires `threads:write` permission.

post.description:
Add one or more tags to a thread for categorization.

Requires `threads:write` permission.

delete.description:
Remove one or more tags from a thread.

Requires `threads:write` permission.

put.description:
Assign a thread to an agent or user. Pass `null` to unassign.

Requires `threads:write` permission.

assigned_to.description: Agent/user identifier, or null to unassign

get.description:
Returns all inboxes across all domains for your organization.

Requires `inboxes:read` permission.

post.description:
Create a new inbox. Domain is auto-resolved if not provided — your first custom domain is used, or the shared `commune.email` domain on free plans.

Requires `inboxes:write` permission.

local_part.description: Local part of the email address (e.g. `support` for `support@yourdomain.com`)

domain_id.description: Domain to create the inbox on. Auto-resolved if omitted.

get.description:
Returns all custom domains registered for your organization.

Requires `domains:read` permission.

post.description:
Register a new custom domain. DNS verification is required before the domain can receive email.

Requires `domains:write` permission.

region.description: AWS region for the domain's sending infrastructure

get.description:
Returns details for a specific domain.

Requires `domains:read` permission.

post.description:
Trigger DNS verification for a domain. Configure the required DNS records from `GET /v1/domains/{domainId}/records` before calling this endpoint.

Requires `domains:write` permission.

get.description:
Returns the DNS records that must be configured at your DNS provider to verify this domain.

Requires `domains:read` permission.

Returns all inboxes belonging to a specific domain.

Requires `inboxes:read` permission.

post.summary: Create an inbox on a domain
post.description:
Create a new inbox on a specific domain.

Requires `inboxes:write` permission.

get.description:
Returns a single inbox by domain and inbox ID.

Requires `inboxes:read` permission.

put.description:
Update an inbox's local part, webhook configuration, or status.

Requires `inboxes:write` permission.

delete.description:
Permanently delete an inbox. This does not delete stored messages.

Requires `inboxes:write` permission.

put.description:
Set a JSON Schema to automatically extract structured data from incoming emails. Extracted data is included in the `message.received` webhook payload and in the message metadata.

Requires `inboxes:write` permission and a Business/Enterprise plan.

example.name: support_ticket
example.description: Extract support ticket fields from customer emails

delete.description:
Remove structured data extraction configuration from an inbox.

Requires `inboxes:write` permission.

post.description:
Upload a file to use as an attachment when sending emails. Returns an `attachment_id` to pass in the `attachments` array of `POST /v1/messages/send`.

Maximum file size is limited by your plan's storage quota.

Requires `attachments:write` permission.

get.description:
Returns metadata for an attachment without its content. Use `GET /v1/attachments/{attachmentId}/url` to get a download link.

Requires `attachments:read` permission.

Returns a temporary signed URL to download the attachment. For Cloudinary-stored files the URL expires after `expires_in` seconds. For database-stored files, a `data:` URL is returned.

Requires `attachments:read` permission.

Returns webhook delivery attempts with optional filters. Useful for debugging failed deliveries and reviewing delivery history.

Requires `messages:read` permission.

Returns full detail for a single delivery including all attempt history.

Requires `messages:read` permission.

post.description:
Manually re-queue a failed or dead webhook delivery for immediate retry.

Requires `messages:write` permission.

get.description:
Returns per-endpoint delivery health statistics for the last 24 hours, including success rates and average latency.

Requires `messages:read` permission.

post.description:
Fire a synthetic `message.received` event to an inbox's webhook endpoint. Use this to verify your webhook handler is working without sending a real email.

The request is POSTed directly to your endpoint with the same headers as real events (`x-commune-signature`, `x-commune-timestamp`, `x-commune-delivery-id`) plus `x-commune-test: true`.

Requires `messages:write` permission.

inbox_id.description: ID of the inbox to test. The inbox must have a webhook endpoint configured.

status_code.description: HTTP status returned by your endpoint

get.description:
Returns outbound email delivery statistics (sent, delivered, bounced, complained, failed, suppressed) for an inbox or domain over a time window.

Requires `messages:read` permission.

List recent delivery events (bounces, complaints, etc.) for an inbox, domain, or specific message.

Requires `messages:read` permission.

Returns email addresses that have been suppressed (bounced or complained) for an inbox or domain. Emails to suppressed addresses are blocked automatically.

Requires `messages:read` permission.

Search email threads by natural language query. Uses semantic vector search (Qdrant + embeddings) when available, falls back to regex-based subject/content search.

Requires `threads:read` permission and a Business/Enterprise plan.

search_type.description: Whether vector or regex search was used

get.description: Returns the current SMS/voice credit balance for your organization.
Returns available credit purchase bundles with pricing.

post.description: Create a Stripe Checkout session to purchase a credit bundle. Returns a `checkout_url` to redirect the user to.

cancel_url.description: Redirect URL if checkout is cancelled

get.description: Returns this OpenAPI 3.0.3 specification document. No authentication required.

tags.name: Inboxes
tags.description: Manage inboxes and configure webhooks and data extraction

tags.name: Domains
tags.description: Register and verify custom sending/receiving domains

tags.name: Attachments
tags.description: Upload attachments for outbound email and retrieve attachment content

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Monitor and debug webhook delivery. Commune guarantees at-least-once delivery with exponential backoff retries.

tags.name: Delivery
tags.description: Outbound email delivery metrics, events, and suppression lists
